description: The Pure fragrance for men by dunhill is signature Dunhill sophisticatioin, right from its cool blue colour to the irreverant flask. A watery, aqua opening with a soft musky drydown and marginal longevity, it opens with a floral burst and mellows down to a woodsy tone.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
